verses.text: “Tua hun ciangin Judah leh Jerusalem, a nidang hun lai mah uh ka bangsak kik ding hi

Minam dang khempeuh kaikhawmin Jehoshafat Kuam-ah ka paipih ding hi. Ka mihingte tungah a bawlnasa uh hangin tua munah amaute thu ka khen ding hi. Amaute in Israel mite, gamdangah thehthang uh a, ka gamsung teng phelhawm mangkhin uh hi
A galmatte uh kua in ngah ding, ci-in ai san uh a, zu leh numei leina dingin numeino leh naupangnote sila-in a zuak uh hi

“Taia khua, Sidon khua, leh Filistia gam khempeuh aw, kei bang hong cih nuamin a kinei na hi uh hiam? Bang khat peuhpeuh hangin hong thukkik nuamin a kinei na hi uh hiam? Kei a hong thukkik na hih uh leh, kei zong manlang takin kong thukkik pah ding hi
Ka ngun, ka kham, leh ka na manpha tampite la-in, na biakinn sung uhah na puak uh hi
Judah leh Jerusalem mite, amau' gam panin gamlapi-ah paipihin, Grik mite tungah na zuak uh hi
Tu-in amaute na zuakna uh mun panin a lakhia kik ding ka hi a, amaute tungah na bawl bangun note tungah kong bawl ding hi
Na tanute uh leh na tapate uh Judah mite tungah ka zuak ding a, amaute in a gamlapi-a om Seba minamte tungah zuaksawn ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in gen khinzo hi
“Minam dangte tungah hih bangin thuzaksakna bawl in: Galhang mite sam un la, galdo dingin kithawi un. Galkap khempeuh kaikhawmin hong kuan un
Lokhawhna tute namsau-in seek un la, singhiang heuhna temkawite teipi-in seek un. A thahat lote nangawn in do uh hen
Kimkotah a om minam dang khempeuh aw, manlangin hong kuan un la, tua kuamah hong kikhawm un. Topa aw, na galhangte hong paipih suk in
“Minam dangte hong kithawi hen la, Jehoshafat Kuam-ah hong kuan suk uh hen. Kimkotah a om minam dang khempeuh' thu a khen dingin Topa ahi keimah, tua munah ka tu ding hi
Amaute gilo mahmah uh ahih manin anlak huna buhsi bangin atgawp un la, leenggahtui dawhna a dim letin a luang, leenggah cilna kuang sunga om leenggah bangin tuancil gawp un,” a ci hi
Thukhenna Kuam-ah a tul a thenin om uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua lai munah Topa' ni hong tung baih ding hi
Ni leh kha mialta a, aksite zong taang nawnlo hi.
Zion Mual panin Topa hong hawksuk a, Jerusalem panin hong awngkek a, vanpi leh leipi a ling damdam hi. Ahi zongin Topa pen ama mite' belhpa hi a, Israel mite a hu ding hi

Tua ciangin Topa in, “Israel-te aw, ka mual siangtho Zion tungah a teng keimah pen Topa note' Pasian ka hihna na hong thei ding uh hi. Jerusalem pen a siangtho biakna khuapi hi ding a, gamdang mite in zokik nawnlo ding uh hi

Tua hun ciangin mualtung khempeuh leenggui lo hi ding a, mual neute khempeuh tungah bawnghon dim ding a, Judah gamsung khempeuhah tui tampi om ding hi. Topa' biakinn panin luitui khat hong luangkhia ding a, Shitthim kuamsung khempeuh a kawtsak ding hi
“Amaute in Judah gam simin, mawhneilo mite that uh ahih manin, Egypt gam, sehnel gam suakin, Edom gam, gamsia suak ding hi

A kithat mite' phu keimah in ka la ding a, a mawhte ka khahkhong kei ding hi. Judah gamah mi teng tawntung ta ding a, Jerusalem-ah a khangkhangin mi om tawntung ding a, Zion Mual-ah Topa a teng ding hi.” a ci hi.
